narrative:
Precinct Georges Run (precinct in Jefferson County) has 454 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
